rationale: Educ. Code §12.101 governs commissioner authority to grant open-enrollment charter school charters. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 12.101. AUTHORIZATION. (a) In accordance with this subchapter, the commissioner may grant a charter on the application of an eligible entity for an open-enrollment charter school
_note: No conflict. The rule_text concerns charter school authorization and is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
